description: Round 2 feature build: sidebar restructure, home dashboard, revenue cycle (AR dashboard, unbilled worklist, client balance worklist), voicemail triage, global task board, reporting (billing + onboarding), staff NPI registry, and spreadsheet upload.

userStories.title: Sidebar restructure and route scaffolding
userStories.description: As a user, I need the sidebar updated to reflect Round 2 modules with real routes instead of Phase 2 stubs.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar matches exact structure from handoff: Command Center (top, links to /), Onboarding (with count badge), Revenue Cycle (no Phase 2 tag), Voicemail (no Phase 2 tag), Reports section with Onboarding + Billing sub-items, Admin with Manage Staff + Config, My Tasks as persistent global item with task count badge at bottom
All 'Phase 2' and 'Round 2' tags/labels are removed from sidebar items
Clicking Revenue Cycle, Voicemail, Reports, or My Tasks no longer shows a toast — they navigate to real routes
Revenue Cycle has sub-routes: /billing, /billing/unbilled, /billing/collections
Reports has sub-routes: /reports/onboarding, /reports/billing
Voicemail route: /voicemail
My Tasks route: /tasks
Command Center navigates to / (home dashboard route)
All new routes render placeholder components with the route name (will be built in later stories)
Sidebar logo fills ~95% of sidebar width
App.jsx routing updated with all new routes
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Spreadsheet upload UI with SheetJS parsing
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to upload onboarding and billing xlsx files so the app can parse and use the data in-browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Install xlsx (SheetJS) package as a dependency
New SpreadsheetUpload.jsx component in admin section, accessible from Config route
Two upload zones: one for onboarding xlsx, one for billing xlsx
On file select, parse xlsx in-browser using SheetJS — no data sent to external servers
Validate expected columns/tabs before accepting: billing must have 'unpaid at 350pm' and 'ins unbilled' tabs; onboarding must have 'Need to Check' tab
Show validation errors if columns don't match expected schema
After successful parse, show: last upload timestamp, row count, file name for each upload
Store parsed data in React context (BillingDataContext) so other components can consume it
BillingDataContext provides: unpaidClaims array, unbilledClaims array, isLoaded boolean, uploadTimestamp
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Billing data service — parse xlsx into structured records
userStories.description: As a developer, I need billing xlsx data parsed into structured JavaScript objects for use across billing components.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/services/billing.js with parsing functions for both billing tabs

parseUnpaidClaims(sheetData) parses 'unpaid at 350pm' tab rows into objects with fields: dateOfService, client, clinician, billingCode, primaryInsurance, secondaryInsurance, ratePerUnit, units, totalFee, clientPaymentStatus, clientCharge, clientUninvoiced, clientPaid, clientUnpaid, insurancePaymentStatus, insuranceCharge, insurancePaid, writeOff, totalUnpaid

parseUnbilledClaims(sheetData) parses 'ins unbilled' tab rows into objects with fields: dateOfService, client, clinician, billingCode, payer, amountOwed, status (default 'Unbilled'), outreachAttempts array, notes
Dollar values parsed as numbers (strip $ and commas)
Date values parsed into consistent format
Filter out empty/header rows automatically
Helper functions: calcARAgingBuckets(claims), calcKPIs(claims), filterClaims(claims, filters)
calcARAgingBuckets groups by Date of Service into 0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 91-120, 120+ day buckets with dollar totals
SpreadsheetUpload.jsx uses these parsers when processing uploaded files
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Voicemail data service — read VM tab from onboarding sheet
userStories.description: As a developer, I need voicemail data read from the VM tab of the onboarding Google Sheet.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fetchVoicemails(accessToken, sheetId) function to sheets.js that reads the VM tab

VM tab actual columns (0-indexed): [0] Date, [1] Time, [2] Number, [3] Name, [4] About The Message, [5] TYPE, [6] ACTION, [7] Notes, [8] Location, [9] Insurance, [10] Task Complete, [11-20] Outreach attempts (Date/Method pairs x5), [21] Notes (second notes column), [22] FWD, [23] Called Back

Parse VM tab columns into structured objects: date, time, number, name, aboutMessage, type, action, notes, location, insurance, taskComplete (bool), outreachAttempts (5 date/method pairs from cols 11-20), forwarded (FWD col 22, bool), calledBack (col 23, bool)

Derive voicemail status from existing fields: taskComplete=true → 'Closed', forwarded=true → 'Forwarded to Clinician', calledBack=true → 'Called Back — Reached', action contains relevant keyword → map accordingly, else 'New / Unreviewed'
Generate a unique ID for each voicemail (name + date + time composite)
Shift dates to within last 7 days for demo purposes (add offset from original date to current date)
useSheets hook updated to fetch voicemails alongside other data
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Home Dashboard — greeting, KPI cards, and quick nav
userStories.description: As a user, I want a home dashboard as my landing page after login with KPIs and quick navigation to all modules.
acceptanceCriteria: HomeDashboard.jsx renders at / route (Command Center)
Personalized greeting: 'Good morning/afternoon/evening, James' — hardcode 'James' for demo, use time-of-day logic

4 KPI cards: Active Onboarding Queue (count from clients), Total AR Unpaid (dollar from billing data, show $0 if no billing data uploaded), Open Voicemails (count unresolved), Urgent Items (count across all workflows)
KPI cards use IBM Plex Mono for numbers, Sora for labels
KPI numbers animate with count-up effect on mount
My Tasks summary strip: count of open tasks by category (Onboarding, Billing, Voicemail, General) — show 0 counts gracefully

Quick nav tiles: large clickable cards linking to Onboarding (/onboarding), Revenue Cycle (/billing), Voicemail (/voicemail), Reports (/reports/onboarding), Staff (/admin/staff), Config (/admin/config)
Nav tiles have icons (lucide-react), hover effect with subtle shadow elevation
Design uses --bg background, --surface card backgrounds, --accent highlights
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: AR Dashboard — KPI cards and claims data table
userStories.description: As a billing staff member, I want to see AR summary KPIs and a filterable table of all unpaid claims.
acceptanceCriteria: ARDashboard.jsx renders at /billing route

4 KPI cards: Total Unpaid (sum of totalUnpaid), Insurance Unpaid (count where insurancePaymentStatus=UNPAID), Client Unpaid (count where clientPaymentStatus=UNPAID), Unbilled to Insurance (count where insurancePaymentStatus=UNBILLED)
KPI numbers use IBM Plex Mono, animate with count-up on mount
Dollar amounts formatted with $ and commas (e.g. $765,821)
Data table below KPIs showing all unpaid claims: Date of Service, Client, Clinician, Billing Code, Primary Insurance, Total Fee, Total Unpaid, Client Status, Insurance Status
Table rows use alternating background for readability
Table is scrollable with sticky header if more than ~20 rows visible
If no billing data uploaded yet, show a friendly empty state: 'Upload billing data in Config to view AR dashboard' with link to config

npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: AR Dashboard — aging chart and filters
userStories.description: As a billing staff member, I want to see AR aging as a visual chart and filter claims by clinician, payer, status, and date range.
acceptanceCriteria: Install recharts package as a dependency
AR Aging stacked bar chart using recharts: 5 buckets (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 91-120, 120+ days) calculated from Date of Service
Chart uses navy/teal/mint/amber color palette, has tooltips showing dollar amounts on hover

Filter bar above the table with dropdowns: Clinician (from unique clinician values), Primary Insurance (from unique payer values), Client Payment Status, Insurance Payment Status, Date Range (from/to date pickers)
Filters apply to both the data table AND the aging chart
Filters are additive (AND logic) — selecting clinician + payer shows only matching rows
Clear Filters button resets all filters
Chart and table update reactively when filters change

userStories.title: Unbilled Claims — outreach tracking and action buttons
userStories.description: As a billing staff member, I want to log outreach attempts and take actions on unbilled claims.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a claim card opens a ClaimDrawer (slide-in from right, same pattern as ClientDrawer)
ClaimDrawer shows full claim details + outreach log + action buttons
Outreach tracking: up to 5 attempts, each with date + method (Phone Call, Text, Email, Left VM, Sent to Julia) — same pattern as onboarding outreach
Log Attempt button adds new outreach entry with current date and selected method
Action buttons: Mark Submitted, Add Note, Resubmit, Write Off (requires reason text input), Block — No SP Appt
Each action updates the claim status accordingly
Write Off action requires a written reason before submission — show text input modal/inline
Claim status changes persist in BillingDataContext (in-memory for now)
Success toast shown after each action

npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Client Balance Collection Worklist
userStories.description: As a billing staff member, I want a worklist of clients with unpaid balances to track collection outreach.
acceptanceCriteria: ClientBalanceWorklist.jsx renders at /billing/collections route
Filters unpaid claims data to Client Payment Status = UNPAID
Summary KPI: total client count and total unpaid dollar amount
Each client rendered as a card: Client name, total unpaid amount, clinician, most recent date of service
Outreach tracking: up to 5 attempts with date + method (Text, Phone Call, Email, Left Voicemail)
Resolution statuses: Pending Outreach, In Progress, Paid in Full, Payment Plan Established, Written Off, Blocked from Scheduling in SP, Unresolvable / Referred Out
Payment Plan requires note with amount and schedule ($25/mo minimum)
Written Off requires authorization + reason note
Blocked from Scheduling requires a note — manual flag only
All non-'Paid in Full' resolutions require a note before saving
Status changes persist in BillingDataContext (in-memory)

Notes field for adding notes to the voicemail

Filter tabs at top: All / Onboarding / Billing / Voicemail / General
List view (default): tasks grouped by status, showing priority badge, due date, assigned to, category tag
Priority badges: Low=gray, Medium=blue, High=amber, Urgent=red

userStories.title: Task Board — Kanban view and seed tasks
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Kanban view of tasks and pre-seeded diagnostic blocker tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle between List view and Kanban view on the task board
Kanban columns: To Do, In Progress, Done
Cards show: title, priority badge, due date, assigned to, category tag
Drag and drop between columns updates task status (use @dnd-kit)

Seed tasks pre-populated from diagnostic blockers in handoff doc: B1 (SP contact form, Onboarding), B3 (clearinghouse access, Billing), B4 (48hr co-sign SLA, Billing), B5 (direct clearinghouse access, Billing), B6 (notes attached to claims, Billing), B7 (secondary insurance audit, Billing), B8 (unified balance threshold, Billing), B9 (deductible billing logic, Billing), B10 (write-off authorization, Billing), plus 3 open questions (custody module, GFE workflow, supervisor co-sign)
Seed tasks are only created if Tasks tab is empty (avoid duplicates on reload)
All seed tasks default to: Status=To Do, Priority=High, Assigned To=unassigned
